attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OE_AUDIT_ATTR.SEQUENCE_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OE_AUDIT_ATTR.ENTITY_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OE_AUDIT_ATTR.ENTITY_DISPLAY_NAME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OE_AUDIT_ATTR.ATTRIBUTE_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OE_AUDIT_ATTR.ATTRIBUTE_DISPLAY_NAME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OE_AUDIT_ATTR.OLD_DISPLAY_VALUE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OE_AUDIT_ATTR.NEW_DISPLAY_VALUE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OE_AUDIT_ATTR.HIST_CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OE_AUDIT_ATTR.ORDER_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OE_AUDIT_ATTR.ENTITY_NUMBER, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OE_AUDIT_ATTR.ORG_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OE_AUDIT_ATTR.REASON, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OE_AUDIT_ATTR.HIST_COMMENTS, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OE_AUDIT_ATTR.USER_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OE_AUDIT_ATTR.USER_NAME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OE_AUDIT_ATTR.RESPONSIBILITY_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OE_AUDIT_ATTR.RESPONSIBILITY_NAME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OE_AUDIT_ATTR.OLD_CONTEXT_VALUE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OE_AUDIT_ATTR.NEW_CONTEXT_VALUE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OE_AUDIT_ATTR.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OE_AUDIT_ATTR.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OE_AUDIT_ATTR.LAST_UPDATED_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OE_AUDIT_ATTR.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OE_AUDIT_ATTR.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OE_AUDIT_ATTR.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OE_AUDIT_ATTR.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OE_AUDIT_ATTR.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OE_AUDIT_ATTR.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OE_AUDIT_ATTR STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OE_AUDIT_ATTR,
 (
 select SEQUENCE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OE_AUDIT_ATTR
 minus
 select SEQUENCE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXSCM_PL_OE_AUDIT_ATTR_BI
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.SEQUENCE_ID = STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OE_AUDIT_ATTR.SEQUENCE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_OE_AUDIT_ATTR.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_PL_OE_AUDIT_ATTR_BI)
